arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Red Devils ace is stretchered off against Leicester with serious-looking injury
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Ayden Heaven suffers a potentially-serious injury during Sunday's Premier League clash with Leicester City at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man United youngster Ayden Heaven, 18, forced off on a stretcher after suffering injury on his first Premier League start against Leicester
arts.sum: Heaven, who joined the club from Arsenal in a deal worth £1million in January, saw an impressive display at the King Power cut short after he tangled with Patson Daka.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Man United dealt huge Ayden Heaven injury blow during Leicester City clash
arts.sum: Man United defender Ayden Heaven was caried off on a stretcher during their clash at Leicester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star taken off on stretcher as Ruben Amorim injury crisis worsens
arts.sum: Manchester United suffered a fresh injury blow during their Premier League match away at Leicester City in yet another piece of bad news for head coach Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven stretchered off in Manchester United’s clash with Leicester
arts.sum: The teenager faces a spell on the sidelines after getting tangled with Patson Daka

arts.ttl: Pogba drops MAJOR transfer hint amid Man Utd links
arts.sum: Pogba drops MAJOR transfer hint amid Man Utd links Juventus mutually terminated Pogba’s contract in November 2024 and the 32-year-old has been linked with a number of clubs in recent months, including Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Manuel Ugarte recalled to Manchester United XI vs Leicester
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte is back in the Man United starting line-up for Sunday night's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'make stunning offer' for Barcelona superstar ahead of summer market
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly put a £59m offer on the table for Barcelona attacker Raphinha, who has been in stunning form this season.
